title: Media Preparation for E. coli growth for Cell-free Protein Synthesis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"217a7","text":"Cell-free protein synthesis reactions require cell-free extract derived from rapidly dividing E. coli cells to produce high yields of protein therapeutics, antigens, enzymes, vaccines, and other proteins. Standard protocols use 2xYTPG media for cell growth. This protocol is for making 1 L of 2xYTPG media.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5tn24","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"275rn","text":"Read more on cell-free protein synthesis here: https://www.swiftscalebio.com/blog/cell-free-protein-synthesis","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":47,"length":62}],"data":{}},{"key":"ljf4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ebc3a","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ef2fp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dun2i","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"etbmr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"97r4s","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"86B70F30C88D11EBB3980A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.swiftscalebio.com/blog/cell-free-protein-synthesis"}}}}

steps: Mix ingredients except for glucose with water below the amount of volume of MilliQ water needed using a plastic beaker and a stir-bar. Once dissolved (you can use a spatula to help break up clumps), pour into a big plastic graduated cylinder and adjust to final volume then mix in original beaker then disperse 750 mL to 2.5 L Tunair flasks for autoclaving.
Prepare the glucose separately in individual 250 mL containers and add just before inoculation.
pH the 2xYTP solution to pH 7.2 using 5 N KOH. Expected Result : Expected concentration of protein in Cell-free extract is ~ 40 mg/mL so make the following dilutions:
creator: Emily Pennell
